name: Kaito Kyōshi
bio: Believes in the power of structure and organization to achieve greatness. 'A clear path is a successful journey.'

name: Akira Kairō
bio: Thrives on the intersection of art and science. 'The boundaries are meant to be transcended.'
speech_style: Rhetorical questions, hinting at deeper meaning

name: Shunji Mōshū
bio: Seeks balance between structure and fluidity. 'The harmony of opposites is the key.'

name: 賢者2
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
